T/Lt. Norman Frank Francis, RNVR (6 Nov 1942 - early 1943)

commanders: Lt.Cdr. Hugh Forbes Robertson-Aikman, RN (26 Sep 1938 - 16 Apr 1940)

13112.history: Sunk off Tobruk by German aircraft.
commanders: Lt.Cdr. Robert Sydney Stafford, RN (15 Mar 1938 - 11 Jan 1940)
Lt.Cdr. (retired) John Fulford Blackburn, RN (11 Jan 1940 - 12 May 1941)

13113.history: Torpedoed and heavily damaged off Bardia by the German submarine U-79. Towed to Alexandria and finally beached at Suez. Declared a total loss. Scrapped in 1945. Hit by U-boatA total loss on 21 Oct 1941 by U-79 (Kaufmann).
commanders: Lt.Cdr. Samuel Reginald Halls Davenport, RN (30 May 1939 - 30 Dec 1941)
A W Packham, RNVR (30 Dec 1941 - 14 Apr 1942)
Lt. John Hollis Linggard, RNVR (14 Apr 1942 - 20 Jun 1942)
T/Lt. Eric Charles Burberry Mares, RNVR (20 Jun 1942 - mid/late42)

13114.history: Heavily damaged on 30 June 1941 off Mersa Matruh by an air attack. Towed to Port Said but declared a total loss. Sunk as target off Cyprus in August 1944.
commanders: Cdr. Harold Thomas Armstrong, RN (28 Oct 1938 - mid 1939)
Cdr. (emergency) Herbert Victor Creer, RAN (Aug 1940 - 5 Oct 1940)
Lt. John Lane Goatley, RN (5 Oct 1940 - 11 Jan 1941)
Lt.Cdr. Edwin Beadnell Carnduff, RN (11 Jan 1941 - mid 1941)
Lt.Cdr. John Andrew Agnew, RN (25 Dec 1938 - 16 Apr 1940)
Lt.Cdr. Hugh Forbes Robertson-Aikman, RN (16 Apr 1940 - 19 Jun 1941)
Lt. Robert Stewart Blacker, RN (19 Jun 1941 - mid 1943)
T/Lt. Arthur William Dow, RNVR (mid 1943 - Oct 1944)
Lt.Cdr. Edward Bernard Tancock, DSC, RN (Oct 1944 - Jan 1945)
T/Lt. Basil Guy Pritchard de Mattos, RNVR (Jan 1945 - 28 Jul 1945)
Lt. Edward Austin Tyrer, DSC, RN (28 Jul 1945 - )

13116.history: HMS Cicala (Lt.Cdr.(Retd.) J.C. Boldero, DSC, RN) was damaged at Hong Kong by Japanese aircraft. Then scuttled in the East Lamma Channel (near Aberdeen) with a total of six depth charges being dropped alongside the hull by HMS MTB 9 (Lt. A. Kennedy, RNVR)
commanders: Lt.Cdr. Denis John Pack-Beresford, RN (8 Feb 1938 - 13 May 1940)
Lt.Cdr. (retired) Gerard Horace Gandy, RN (13 May 1940 - 3 Apr 1941)
Lt.Cdr. (retired) John Christian Boldero, DSC, RN (24 Jun 1941 - 21 Dec 1941)

13117.history: Sold to be broken up for scrap in May 1947.
commanders: Lt.Cdr. Robert Bruce Chandler, RN (8 Feb 1938 - Dec 1939)
T/Lt. Guy Percival L’Estrange, RNVR (Dec 1939 - 29 Jan 1940)
Frank Stanley Redgrove, RNR (29 Jan 1940 - 9 Feb 1940)

Lt.Cdr. John Lane Goatley, RN (Dec 1944 - Jan 1945)
T/Lt. Eric Arthur Bellamy, RNVR (Jan 1945 - Jul 1945)
Lt. John Edwin Dyer, DSC, RN (Jul 1945 - )

13118.history: Sunk at Shanghai by the Japanese cuiser Izumo after rufusing to surrender.

Capt. Percival Henry Gwynne James, RN (5 Jan 1940 - Oct 1940)

Cdr. Arthur Frederick St. George Orpen, RN (15 Feb 1938 - early 1940)

13120.history: Scuttled at Hong Kong on 19 December 1941 to prevent her capture by the Japanese.

T/Lt. John Douglas, RNR (1941 - 19 Dec 1941)

Lt.Cdr. Norman Robins Murch, RN (Apr 1940 - Oct 1940)
Lt.Cdr. Richard Burnaby Cooper, RN (Oct 1941 - Dec 1942)

Cdr. (retired) Hugh Monthermer Montague, RN (10 Feb 1940 - 25 Dec 1941)

13125.history: Sunk at 1845 hours on 14 February 1942 North of Banka Straits in position 01.25'S, 105.00'E by the Japanese light cruiser Yura and the Japanese destroyers Fubuki and Asagiri after being damaged by Japanese aircraft five days previously.
commanders: Lt. John Mark Symonds Cox, RN (25 Dec 1938 - 6 Sep 1939)
Cdr. (retired) Francis William Crowther, DSC, RN (6 Sep 1939 - 5 Aug 1940)
Lt.Cdr. Leopold Joseph Hegarty, DSC, RNR (5 Aug 1940 - 26 Jan 1941)
Lt.Cdr. George Christian Ashworth, SSRNVR (26 Jan 1941 - 14 Feb 1942 (+))

13126.history: Heavily damaged by Japanse aircraft off Rusuk Buaja Island, abandoned and later sank.

13128.history: Decommissioned to reserve in May 1946. Became a RNVR drill ship in 1951. Scrapped in 1968.
